tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.description: OpenAI's conversational AI for writing, brainstorming, coding, and answering complex questions with natural language understanding.

tools.name: Claude
tools.description: Anthropic's helpful AI assistant excellent at long-form writing, document analysis, and thoughtful reasoning across diverse topics.

tools.name: Gemini
tools.description: Google's multimodal AI model that handles text, images, and code with deep integration into Google Workspace.

tools.name: Perplexity AI
tools.description: AI-powered search engine that delivers direct answers with cited sources, perfect for research and fact-checking.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.description: Industry-leading AI image generator producing stunning, artistic visuals from text prompts via Discord and web.

tools.name: DALL·E 3
tools.description: OpenAI's powerful text-to-image model that creates highly detailed, photorealistic images with excellent prompt accuracy.

tools.name: Stable Diffusion
tools.description: Open-source image generation model that can run locally, offering full control over styling and customization.

tools.name: Leonardo AI
tools.description: Creative platform for generating production-ready AI art, game assets, and concept designs with fine-tuned models.

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.description: AI pair programmer that suggests code completions, entire functions, and explains code directly in your IDE.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code that lets you chat with your codebase and generate code with full project context.

tools.name: Replit AI
tools.description: Browser-based coding platform with built-in AI agent that helps build, debug, and deploy full applications.

tools.name: Tabnine
tools.description: AI code completion assistant that supports 30+ languages and prioritizes privacy with on-premise deployment options.

tools.name: Jasper
tools.description: AI content platform for marketing teams to create blogs, ads, emails, and social media copy at scale with brand consistency.

tools.name: Copy.ai
tools.description: AI copywriting tool that generates marketing copy, sales emails, blog intros, and product descriptions in seconds.

tools.name: Grammarly
tools.description: AI-powered writing assistant that checks grammar, spelling, clarity, tone, and provides real-time suggestions everywhere you write.

tools.name: QuillBot
tools.description: AI paraphrasing tool with grammar checker, summarizer, and citation generator — ideal for students and writers.

tools.name: Runway ML
tools.description: Cutting-edge AI video creation suite with text-to-video, video editing, green screen, and motion tracking features.

tools.name: Sora
tools.description: OpenAI's text-to-video model capable of generating realistic, minute-long videos from natural language descriptions.

tools.name: Pictory
tools.description: Turn long-form content like blogs and scripts into engaging short videos automatically using AI.

tools.name: Synthesia
tools.description: Create professional AI videos with realistic avatars and voiceovers in 140+ languages — no camera required.

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.description: State-of-the-art AI voice generator and text-to-speech with realistic voices, cloning, and multilingual support.

tools.name: Suno AI
tools.description: AI music generator that creates full songs with vocals, lyrics, and instruments from simple text prompts.

tools.name: Murf AI
tools.description: AI voiceover platform with 120+ realistic voices in 20+ languages for videos, podcasts, and presentations.

tools.name: Notion AI
tools.description: AI assistant inside Notion that helps write, summarize, brainstorm, and organize knowledge across your workspace.

tools.name: Otter.ai
tools.description: AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings in real-time with action items.

tools.name: Fireflies.ai
tools.description: AI notetaker that joins your meetings to automatically transcribe, summarize, and analyze conversations.

tools.name: Reclaim AI
tools.description: Smart calendar assistant that uses AI to auto-schedule tasks, habits, and meetings around your priorities.

tools.name: Consensus
tools.description: AI-powered academic search engine that extracts evidence-based insights directly from peer-reviewed research papers.

tools.name: Elicit
tools.description: Research assistant that helps you find papers, summarize findings, and extract data from scientific literature.

tools.name: Scite.ai
tools.description: Smart citation tool that shows whether research findings have been supported or contrasted by other studies.

tools.name: Canva AI (Magic Studio)
tools.description: AI design suite with magic write, magic edit, background remover, and instant designs from text prompts.

tools.name: Figma AI
tools.description: AI features built into Figma that help generate designs, rename layers, search assets, and create prototypes faster.

tools.name: Framer AI
tools.description: Generate fully responsive, production-ready websites from text prompts with built-in CMS and publishing.

tools.name: HubSpot AI
tools.description: AI-powered CRM features that help write emails, generate content, score leads, and automate marketing workflows.

tools.name: Surfer SEO
tools.description: AI-powered content optimization tool that helps you write SEO-friendly articles that rank on Google.

tools.name: Khanmigo

tools.name: Duolingo Max
tools.description: AI-powered language learning with personalized explanations, roleplay conversations, and adaptive lessons.

tools.name: Tome
tools.description: AI-powered storytelling and presentation tool that generates full decks with text and images from a single prompt.

tools.name: Gamma
tools.description: Create beautiful presentations, documents, and webpages in seconds using AI — no design or coding skills needed.

tools.name: Beautiful.ai

tools.name: Google Flow
tools.description: Google's AI creative studio for cinematic video, images, and iterative editing with the Flow agent.

tools.name: Stable Video Diffusion
tools.description: Open video generation model for text-to-video and image-to-video workflows with self-hosting support.

tools.name: AnimateDiff

tools.name: ComfyUI
